name: Chicken Noodle Casserole with Cheese and Dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a medium-size saucepan, melt 3 tablespoons butter.
3. When hot, add flour and stir.
4. Add milk all at once and stir with a wire whisk until the mixture comes to a boil.
5. Stir in ricotta until it melts.
6. Add 2 tablespoons Parmesan.
7. Mix pasta with cheese sauce.
8. Stir in dill and almonds.
9. Mix in chicken and season with lots of pepper.
10. Sprinkle remaining 2 tablespoons Parmesan over top.
11. Dot with remaining 1 tablespoon butter.
12. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes, or until hot.
